title: Create: Originium Industry
description: A story about a brand new ore -  Originium, inspired by Arknights.
body:
# Create: Originium Industry

A story about a brand new ore -  Originium, inspired by Arknights. 

⚠ This mod's still **WIP**, many of ideas under way. 

## Things Available

### Items

- Raw Originium
- Originium Shard
- Originium
- Purest Originium

### Fluid

- Molten Originium
- Purest Molten Originium
- Originium Catalyst
